objective: Implement PU-003 by adapting codex-runtime-evidence/v1 packets into runtime-evidence-bundle/v1 without flattening provenance, embedding raw packet bodies, or changing public CLI behavior.
prerequisites: PU-000 reviewed intent and contract baseline exist.

PU-002 validation is replayed on the current worktree before implementation with: pnpm vitest run src/lib/runtime/codex-runtime-evidence.test.ts src/lib/runtime/codex-runtime-source-provenance.test.ts.
The current implementation branch head is recorded before PU-003 code edits so prerequisite evidence cannot float across commits.
inScope: adapter fixtures directly required for PU-003
outOfScope: Public CLI behavior or parser changes
Runtime-card projection fields owned by PU-004
Private delivery-truth composition owned by PU-005
Review-state or external-state production packets owned by PU-009
Any claim that PU-003 completes the full runtime evidence verifier cockpit
implementationRules: Validate Codex packets with the PU-002 validator before producing a runtime-evidence-bundle/v1.
Preserve source classification and raw packet location as runtime-evidence-bundle provenance or source refs rather than copying the full packet into the bundle.

Preserve receipt refs as existing runtime-evidence-bundle source records that remain consumable by current inspectRuntimeEvidenceBundle behavior; do not add runtime-card projection fields or new runtime-card semantics in PU-003.
Add a deterministic negative assertion that the adapted bundle does not persist a full Codex packet body, raw event arrays, full review comments, or bulky telemetry.
Represent unsupported Codex fields as blockers or invalid/blocked sources, not inferred truth.
Keep existing runtime-evidence-bundle/v1 producers valid and unchanged unless a narrow extension is required for Codex provenance.

automationPlan.name: codex packet validator regression
proves: PU-002 validation still rejects malformed Codex packets before adapter mapping

automationPlan.name: runtime evidence adapter validation
proves: provenance and receipt refs are preserved
malformed packet input fails without mutating existing non-Codex evidence behavior
adapted bundle output remains consumable by existing runtime-card source readers without PU-004 projection fields
adapted bundle output does not include full Codex packet bodies or raw event arrays

automationPlan.name: focused PU-003 validation
proves: PU-003 handoff state enables PU-004 without regressing PU-002

stopConditions: Stop if the intent review artifacts are missing or non-empty findings remain unresolved.
Stop if reviewStatus is not reviewed, reviewReceiptRef is null, or the review receipt contains any finding with status open or untriaged.
Stop if PU-002 validation has not been replayed on the current worktree before implementation.
Stop if adapting Codex evidence requires widening public CLI behavior before PU-004.
Stop if runtime-card output changes before PU-004.
Stop if existing runtime-evidence-bundle/v1 validation or runtime-card evidence consumption regresses.
Stop if the adapter embeds raw packet bodies instead of refs and summaries.
rollback: Remove PU-003 adapter tests and fixtures.
Revert any narrow runtime-evidence-bundle provenance extension if existing producers fail validation.
Remove or append corrective receipts for PU-003 review and validation state if implementation is reverted.
Restore docs/goals/codex-runtime-evidence-verifier-cockpit/state.yaml to the previous active task state if PU-003 is rolled back.
Append a rollback note to docs/goals/codex-runtime-evidence-verifier-cockpit/receipts.jsonl rather than deleting historical receipts.
Update .harness/implementation-notes/implementation-notes.html to describe rollback or partial state if the slice is abandoned.
Keep PU-000 through PU-002 artifacts intact.
assumptions: A Codex runtime evidence packet can be represented as a runtime-evidence-bundle/v1 producer without changing runtime-card/v1 in PU-003.
If runtime-evidence-bundle/v1 needs a Codex-specific provenance kind, that extension is additive and validated against existing producers.
PU-004 will own runtime-card projection of any compact Codex summaries; PU-003 only prepares the normalized bundle.
